other_observers: none; Roger Linfield found a Trumpeter Swan here on 3/4/2007, and most likely this is the bird found on the Pueblo CBC on 12/31/2006 by Dave Silverman. The lake froze over just after that, and may have wintered at CF&I Lakes, which are usually closed t
description: A large white swan, with some rust color on the head. The bird has thick neck, and large bill. SEe photo.Behaviors: Swimming on Lake.Call: nonePlumage: adult
